name: Rachel Sargent
intro: I'm a book editor and writer based in London. For the past decade I've worked closely with authors to shape manuscripts into finished books — from the first messy draft to the final proof. I care about clarity, voice, and the quiet architecture that holds a story together.

books.title: Field Notes for the End of Summer
books.author: Placeholder Author

writing.title: On the Art of the Invisible Edit
writing.excerpt: What it means to shape a book without leaving fingerprints on the prose.

writing.title: Reading Slowly in a Fast Year
writing.excerpt: A case for the long, unhurried read in an age of the scroll.

writing.title: The Second Draft Is Where the Book Begins
writing.excerpt: Why the real writing so often starts once the first draft is done.
